hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path" <<< "$(cat)"); PROTECTED="AGENTS.md pyproject.toml Taskfile.yaml .claude/settings.json"; for p in $PROTECTED; do if [[ "$FILE" == *"$p"* ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: $FILE is a protected config file. Harness Engineering practices forbid direct modification without explicit user request or architectural alignment check." >&2; exit 2; fi; done'

bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path" <<< "$(cat)"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -d tests ]; then echo "VERIFYING COMPLETION GATE..."; export PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH:. && uv run pytest tests/ 2>&1 | tail -20 || (echo "BLOCKED: Completion Gate failed. Tests must pass before declaring task finished." >&2; exit 2); fi'
